full.name: Full Project Cycle
full.description: Exhaustive end-to-end development cycle from NotebookLM conceptualization to MVP Launch.

feature.name: Feature Lifecycle
feature.description: Lightweight variant for specific features, skipping identity/market phases and proceeding directly to technical analysis and design.

investigation.name: Investigation & Conception (NotebookLM)
investigation.description: Generate an exhaustive Executive Report covering design, market/financial analysis, name, logo, visual identity, and MVP software specs.

technical_analysis.name: Feature Technical Analysis
technical_analysis.description: Examine the specific feature requirements and create technical specifications for implementation.

design.name: Interface Design (Google Stitch)
design.description: Design user interface inside Google Stitch using MCP integrations. Human polishes design in Stitch.

extraction.name: Design Artifact Extraction
extraction.description: Extract visual assets and design specifications (design.md) from Google Stitch.

construction.name: MVP Construction & Coding
construction.description: Execute development of the application based on the design specifications and templates.

checkpoint_1.name: Human Approval of Executive/Feature Specification
checkpoint_1.description: The human must explicitly review and approve the Executive Report or Feature Specification to move to UI design.

checkpoint_2.name: Human Approval of UI Design
checkpoint_2.description: The human must polish and approve the design layout in Google Stitch before assets and spec are extracted.

checkpoint_3.name: Human Approval of Release Beta (Launch)
checkpoint_3.description: The human must approve compilation and upload of the build to a Release Beta.
